Glendale • Russian Manicures • Boutique Beauty Studio

Precision beauty,
finished with a quiet luxury touch.

Beautyfly LA is a refined beauty studio in Glendale specializing in Russian manicures, Russian pedicures, lashes, and brows. Designed for clients who care about detail, longevity, and an elevated experience from the moment they walk in.

Russian manicure specialty
3909 San Fernando Rd #102, Glendale
Nails, lashes & brows in one polished studio
Signature Focus Russian Manicure Clean cuticle work, refined shaping, glossy finish, detail-led results.
Boutique Experience

Luxury that feels calm, not loud.

Olive tones, marble details, warm lighting, and intentionally precise work create a studio experience that feels polished from every angle.

Services

A cleaner, more refined service presentation built for mobile browsing.

Instead of overwhelming the page with a long visible menu, Beautyfly LA highlights the most requested services first, then lets clients open the complete menu only when they want more detail.

Russian Manicure

Detailed prep, clean cuticle work, and an ultra-refined finish for Beautyfly’s signature look.

$70+
75–90 min Signature specialty

Hard Gel Manicure

Structured strength and a polished luxury finish for clients who want durability without sacrificing elegance.

$90
90 min Longer wear

Volume Lash Set

Soft drama, fuller dimension, and a smooth lash line that still feels polished and high-end.

$160
140 min Popular lash option

Gel Manicure

A clean, polished gel finish for elevated everyday nails.

$80 75 min

Hard Gel Manicure

Added structure and durability with a sleek, luxury finish.

$90 90 min

Russian Manicure

Detailed cuticle work and exceptional finish for the most precise manicure look.

$70+ 75–90 min

Russian Pedicure

A detail-focused pedicure designed with the same clean finish and elevated care.

$80+ 75 min

Classic Lash Set

Soft, elegant definition for a clean enhancement effect.

$140 120 min

Hybrid Lash Set

A fuller finish that blends softness with more visible dimension.

$150 130 min

Volume Lash Set

Soft dramatic fullness with a smooth, polished lash line.

$160 140 min

Mega Volume Lash Set

Maximum softness, depth, and density for clients wanting a high-impact look.

$180 150 min

Lash Lift / Lamination

Lift and tint for a bright, clean, low-maintenance eye look.

$100 60 min

Lash Removal

Professional removal performed with care for lash health and comfort.

$20+ 20–30 min

Brow Lamination

Lift, shape, and polish for fuller-looking brows with a refined finish.

$100 60 min
Booking Notes

Pricing may vary based on length, design complexity, refill timing, and correction work.

For the smoothest booking process, send a photo of your current nails or desired look when reaching out. This helps Beautyfly LA recommend the right service and timing from the start.

The expandable menu keeps the section visually calm while still giving clients the trust signal of a full visible menu.

Gallery

Real work, current trends, and the visual proof clients actually trust.

Instead of splitting attention between a portfolio and Instagram, this section acts as the primary visual gallery. It feels more current, easier to maintain, and more aligned with how beauty clients browse on mobile.

Before & After

Interactive beauty transformations, shown with the same calm clarity as the studio itself.

Use the slider to compare a softer starting point with a finished Beautyfly LA effect. This section is ideal for future real client comparisons.

BeforeAfter
Why this matters

Luxury beauty is often felt in the details clients can’t always describe — but they notice immediately.

At Beautyfly LA, transformation is less about excess and more about refinement. Clean prep, thoughtful shaping, polished symmetry, and a result that feels expensive without looking overdone.

This section can later be updated with real manicure growth-out comparisons, lash set transformations, or brow lamination before-and-after photography for even stronger conversion.

Testimonials

Luxury is confirmed in the details — and in what clients say after.

Thoughtful service, precision work, and a studio atmosphere that feels elevated from the moment you arrive.

I’m extremely selective about nails, and this studio truly understands detail. My manicure looked clean, elegant, and expensive without feeling overdone. The shaping and cuticle work were beautiful.

A
Alina P.

Russian manicure client

The salon is gorgeous in person and the work matches the atmosphere. Everything feels intentional, polished, and high-end. I left feeling like every detail had been taken seriously.

M
Mila R.

Beautyfly LA client

My lashes came out soft and full exactly the way I wanted. It didn’t feel rushed at all, and the final look was clean, flattering, and beautifully done.

S
Sofia K.

Lash client

What clients notice most

Precision, cleanliness, intentional shaping, and an atmosphere that feels elevated but welcoming.

Why they come back

Consistent quality, polished results, and beauty work that looks refined both in person and in photos.

What sets the studio apart

A calm luxury aesthetic, detail-led beauty work, and boutique-level care across nails, lashes, and brows.

Studio Policies

Clear expectations for a smooth, elevated appointment experience.

Policies help protect your scheduled time, preserve the studio flow, and ensure every client receives the same attentive level of service.

Arrival

Please arrive on time. Late arrivals may require a shortened service or rescheduling to protect the next client’s appointment.

Cancellations

We recommend at least 24 hours notice for cancellations or appointment changes whenever possible.

Guests

To maintain a calm and comfortable studio environment, additional guests are discouraged unless arranged in advance.

Design Requests

Inspiration photos are welcome. Please send them before your appointment so enough time can be reserved for your desired look.

Deposit Instructions

Simple booking guidance, explained clearly.

Deposits help secure your time and allow the studio to prepare for each appointment with care. Update these instructions with your exact payment method when ready.

How booking works
1

Send your request

Book through Instagram DM, phone, or the inquiry form with your preferred service, date, and time.

2

Share inspiration if needed

If you want a custom set, attach photos so the studio can confirm timing, pricing, and design complexity.

3

Submit deposit

Once your appointment is confirmed, a non-refundable deposit may be required to secure the booking.

4

Receive confirmation

You’ll receive final confirmation details including appointment time, address, and any prep instructions.

Suggested Deposit Policy

Professional, client-friendly wording you can keep or customize.

A deposit may be required to reserve your appointment and will be applied toward your service total. Deposits are non-refundable and may be forfeited for no-shows, last-minute cancellations, or repeated rescheduling.

If you are running late, please notify the studio as soon as possible. Accommodation depends on the schedule for the day.

For custom nail art, correction work, or large changes from your booked service, pricing may be adjusted based on time and complexity.

About Beautyfly LA

A beauty studio shaped by precision, softness, and a strong eye for detail.

Beautyfly LA was created for clients who appreciate a clean, polished result and an environment that feels quietly elevated. The studio aesthetic blends olive tones, marble finishes, warm lighting, and refined beauty work to create an experience that feels both modern and intentional.

With services spanning Russian manicures, Russian pedicures, lashes, and brows, the focus remains the same: detail-led beauty that feels elegant in person, in photos, and in everyday life.

Known for refined shaping, clean prep, and glossy finished detail
Designed as a boutique beauty destination rather than a high-volume salon
Built for clients who value precision, longevity, and a luxury feel
Visit the Studio

A location section built to increase confidence, not just show a map.

Beautyfly LA is positioned for Glendale clients and nearby visitors who want a premium beauty destination without the friction of a confusing salon visit.

Beautyfly LA

3909 San Fernando Rd #102
Glendale, CA 91204

Convenient for Glendale and nearby neighborhoods
Boutique studio feel, not a rushed walk-in atmosphere
Ideal for combining nails, lashes, and brows in one visit
Easy-to-find Glendale location designed for clients who want a polished, quieter beauty experience.
Update this section with exact parking guidance so first-time visitors feel more confident before arrival.
Best for scheduled appointments rather than a high-volume drop-in flow, which reinforces the boutique experience.
The studio atmosphere is visually polished, making it ideal for clients who care about both results and environment.

FAQ

Helpful answers before your appointment.

These answers are written to create clarity and confidence before booking. Adjust the details anytime to match your exact studio policy.

You can book by Instagram DM, phone, or the inquiry form on this website. If you are requesting custom nails, it helps to include inspiration photos when booking.

Yes. Russian manicure work is one of the studio’s signature specialties, known for its detailed prep, clean cuticle finish, and refined polished result.

Yes. Beautyfly LA offers nails, lash services, and brow services. Availability may vary by service and artist schedule.

Absolutely. Inspiration photos are encouraged, especially for custom design requests. They help confirm timing, feasibility, and pricing in advance.

A deposit may be required to secure your appointment depending on the service and booking type. You can customize this wording to match your exact policy.

Please mention any existing product, outside work, or removal needs at the time of booking so the correct timing and pricing can be reserved for your appointment.

Contact & Inquiry

Choose the booking method that feels easiest for you.

Whether you prefer to DM, call, or send a website inquiry, Beautyfly LA offers multiple paths to book your next appointment.

Booking Options

For the quickest response, Instagram DM is recommended. You can also call or use the inquiry form for appointment requests and questions.

Instagram DM

@beautyfly_la — best for booking requests, inspiration photos, and quick service questions.

Phone

(818) 555-1234 — update with your real business number when ready.

Studio Address

3909 San Fernando Rd #102, Glendale, CA 91204
